author: Garrulity
text:
SKILL.md: repo field is claim-anchored, not create-anchored

bl-4f29's multi-repo-section rewrite landed an hour before bl-8994 and described the pre-bl-8994 behavior: repo as create-anchored with an 'else its repo path' basename fallback, and bl-8994 as a future 'tracks tightening this'.

Correct the two stale clauses. repo is anchored at bl claim to the claiming clone (the definitive code home); bl create only stamps a provisional value. Only a fetchable origin URL is ever auto-written — a null means 'origin unknown,' not 'single-repo.' Note the bl update <id> repo= explicit fixup path. The surrounding guidance was already correct and is untouched.
